title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Enki and the Birth of the Sun
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Enki and the Birth of the Sun.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Enki and the Birth of the Sun.

translation.text: From 'Enki and the Birth of the Sun': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
